comments.author: @jacinta2707
comments.text: Your pronunciation of Uluru is wrong. It is pronounced oo · luh · roo. You should Google to check the names in all your videos. Considering your pronunciation of Uluru, I can see that you have not been there because there is no way you would have that pronunciation. So this is not an inside story; it is research findings. These locations need a lot more research and understanding before one heads off to them. The safest one to try is the 12 Apostles, as it is a day trip from Melbourne or an overnight trip to stay in a town close by.
